nasb.text: Why did you sit among the sheepfolds, To hear the piping for the flocks? Among the divisions of Reuben There were great searchings of heart.

esv.text: Why did you sit still among the sheepfolds, to hear the whistling for the flocks? Among the clans of Reuben there were great searchings of heart.

cnv.text: 你為甚麼坐在羊圈之中， 聽呼喚群畜的笛聲呢？ 在流本的眾溪旁，有心懷大志的。

ccb.text: 吕便人为什么坐在羊圈中听悠悠笛声？ 他们举棋不定。
